glossary.subject: Invalid GEA's received for {{ mappings.orderType }}:Order  Assignment No: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

One or more GEA's passed to DNE could not be validated and therefore cannot be configured as part of this order {{ mappings.orderNumber }} . Please review the invalid GEAs and reason on the URL (link below) and ensure these GEA's can be validated when passed to DNE in the next order.
Please check the {{ mappings.url }} with the order number for more information.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
